gate: stage-3 adversarial_harden — >=3 consecutive clean fresh-context rounds

attempted_breaks: make run_all green while the skill is wrong (coverage gaps, pass-while-wrong, self-test gaming)
close the release gate dishonestly (always-green evidence, flipped boolean, gutted harness)
diff every documented command/flag/default/error-code/step against capabilities + help + tool source
find internal contradictions + eval-case/asset incoherence + trigger-boundary overlap
crash the 3 scripts / force wrong exit codes via edge inputs
pass-while-wrong on the 3 new + 2 changed checks (polarity, incidental-prose, markdown-split fabrication)
bypass check_release_gate alwaysGreen (|| exit 0, | cat, ( true ), [ 1 ], cat /dev/null) incl. laundering a failing command
bypass check_battery_clean (unrelated-green-check lock, whitespace-distinct contexts, fabricated kind)
re-verify all 8 round-1 fixes against source + find remaining doc-vs-CLI drift
walk every workflow end-to-end as an agent: where would it fail a real task?
pass-while-wrong on the rebuilt meaning-checks (polarity word-order/verb, stray-pipe coverage, backticked-binary fabrication)
bypass the hardened gate/battery checkers (denylist gaps, zero-width contexts, unrelated new-check lock)
re-verify all round-2 fixes against source + find new contradictions
completeness: what real capability / failure-mode / eval is still missing for an agent
exhaustive function-by-function source diff of every doc claim (came back essentially clean)
find a NEW structural gaming class (not a phrasing variant) in the 14 checks + 3 checkers
trace 6 realistic agent tasks end-to-end and find where the skill makes an agent fail

rounds.lens: fan-out: harness-new-class (told the accepted limits) + agent-simulation-edge-cases + final-consistency-drift
attempted_breaks: find a NEW structural harness hole beyond the documented accepted-limits
trace 8 edge-case agent workflows (multi-element, storage, camera-mock, two-projects, doctor-subdir, eval/data-path)
final consistency + drift sweep across 4 rounds of edits (returned a full clean bill)
find a NEW structural harness hole beyond the 5 accepted limits
trace combination/less-trodden agent tasks (console paging, screenshot dir, eval truncation, nav tabbar, setPageData)
verify round-5 edits broke nothing + final drift sweep

rounds.lens: leaner confirmation: harness-new-class + agent-simulation (accepted-limits + fixed-list disclosed)
attempted_breaks: find a NEW structural harness hole beyond the 5 accepted limits (the skeptic validated its own proposed fix)
trace remaining realistic agent tasks for any uncovered failure path

rounds.lens: final convergence: harness-structural (declared CONVERGED — no new defect) + agent-sim/consistency/drift
attempted_breaks: gut every check + neuter seeds (self-test honesty); release-gate/battery bypass; full doc<->CLI surface incl READMEs — ALL HELD
trace every documented task + re-read all docs for contradiction + asset coherence (clean except 1 doc item)

regressions.note: checks were documented->real only; new check asserts every caps command+shorthand is documented.
attach-forbidden + no-implicit safe-defaults were unasserted; new check added.
design-record listed 10 eval ids vs 13; new check asserts parity; data synced.
broadened from code-spans to all text after fixing the 'vince-mp execution' prose FP.
scoped from whole-doc to the cli-contract '## Error contract' section.
corrected to {type:'scancode',detail:{result,scanType,type:scanType}} + dropped 'bindscancode' in SKILL/cli-contract/skyline-media.
200KB shorthand cap vs generic ~20KB JSON truncation.
--probe-elements uses '*' with no override; NOTE added.
softened to 'if available'.
launch clarified human-gated (explicit user authorization).
added Skyline->WebView migration to do-not list.
reclassified boundary_path + task authorizes instrumentation.
softened 'it will be X' to 'the CLI flags it, e.g. X'.
runs required core itself + rejects always-green evidence.
--consecutive positive-integer guard.
--target value guard.
--ledger value guard.
tolerant read() + exists() isFile().
--json emits {ok:false,error} on CLI-down.
non-string/empty evidence now fails the gate.
evals/ -> scripts/ in messages.
portable 'vince-mp capabilities --json' instead of ../../tools path.
round schema + cross-round distinct context + documented regressions.
rebuilt: bind negation to the field + REJECT inverted polarity ('attach may include projectPath' / 'performs implicit'); subtle self-test seeds a decoy 'must not include' + inverted contract.
rebuilt: require command-position (a `vince-mp <t>` invocation or a backticked token in a markdown table row), not an incidental backtick in prose; subtle self-test seeds a prose-only mention.
strip * emphasis (keep backticks so noun phrases stay blocked) + [a-z0-9] first char; subtle self-test seeds a bold-split '**vince-mp** **wipeall**' fabrication.
evidence must be a SIMPLE command run without a shell (kills `|| exit 0`, `| cat`, `( true )`) + green-program denylist (true/:/echo/test/[/cat); verified by spot-check.
kind:check added_check must be in ledger.new_checks (a hardening-introduced check), so a defect can't be 'locked' by an unrelated pre-existing green check; verified by dishonest-ledger spot-check.
context dedup on trim().toLowerCase(); verified by dishonest-ledger spot-check.
KEYSTONE: self-test now requires catching EVERY seed incl. a subtle near-miss per content check, so a proxy/string-presence check no longer self-tests green.
runtime-protocol + avoid_launch_recovery eval reworded: read the code from session start/status; doctor is a static pre-flight that can't test the live port.
skyline-media: scan needs the scanner page current + the right handler name (--method); wrong name/page is a no-op.
evidence-and-failures: networkInstall -> trigger -> networkList -> networkRestore recipe; no `network` shorthand.
cli-contract shot row: session full-screenshot path vs one-shot screenshot/media requiring --connect.
cli-contract: session start always attaches (may spawn headless cli auto); launch mode is separate + human-gated.
scoped the logs trigger to 'this Mini Program's backend error log'.
console cap is per-bucket (message + exception each 1000).
added --max-elements to the snapshot shorthand row.
broadened inverted-polarity: any positive-permission verb (accepts/allows/supports/...) not just 'include', + 'implicitly performs' word order; subtle seed uses both evasions.
table detection now requires a real row (>=2 pipes); a prose sentence with a stray '|' no longer grants coverage credit.

R3 tried to catch the `vince-mp` <word> backticked-binary fabrication via an IGNORE-set hack; R5 proved that leaks (IGNORE nouns like call/command escape in command position), so it was REVERTED. The `vince-mp` <word> form is undecidable (noun phrase vs fabrication) -> accepted limit content_check_nl_undecidability; plain/bold fabrications ARE still caught.
new check flags any `vince-mp <token>` where token is a workflow-step but not a real command/shorthand; docs reworded to show longpress/elementTrigger/elementScreenshot via step.
documented that snapshot clears+renumbers the uid map (query appends) in ui-element-workflow + cli-contract + evidence-and-failures (source: snapshot.js:141 clear vs :95 append).
cli-contract console cell now says message+exception buffers each capped 1000.
added UNKNOWN_ENV -> `vince-mp env list` recovery.
added storage-mutation hard rule + STORAGE_CLEAR_REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION.
added *_UNSUPPORTED vs *_FAILED mapping in skyline-media.
metric-plan now references run_all harness + notes 60/60 is a snapshot.
green-program denylist matches basename (/usr/bin/true) + adds env/sleep.
context dedup strips zero-width/format chars before compare; verified by a zero-width-ledger spot-check.
added eval.vince_mp.network_instrument (boundary) + synced design-record ids.
added eval.vince_mp.storage_clear_confirm (adversarial) + synced design-record ids.
added eval.vince_mp.session_connection_lost (boundary) + synced design-record ids.

the must-not-include positive contract was enforced only for projectPath; now captures the must-not-include CLAUSE (to its period) and requires EVERY attach.forbidden field in it; doc lists all three; seed mkFail3 drops launch/reLaunch.
tap/input resolve on event dispatch, not handler completion; SKILL + ui-element now say to wait/poll data before asserting an effect (source: Element.tap awaits dispatch only).
SESSION_START_FAILED -> read details.logTail / session log for the underlying AUTOMATOR_CONNECT_FAILED/APP_NOT_RUNNING (the daemon attaches out-of-process).
session start succeeding = port attached; run page/data next — a fast APP_NOT_RUNNING means the app isn't running.
logs uses the currently-selected env (default mockLan); documented `env use <key>` FIRST then `logs`, confirm with `env current`.
null elements in rounds[]/cases[] now produce a clean FAIL, not a stack trace.
metric-plan eval_cases 13 -> 16.

the R3 IGNORE-set whitelisted nouns (call/command/...) in ALL positions, so `vince-mp call force-reset` (fabricated, plain) escaped. Reverted the binary-backtick strip + IGNORE: plain/bold fabrications are caught again (verified `vince-mp call` -> FAIL); backticked-binary form is an accepted limit.
a null entry in confirmed_defects[] now yields a clean FAIL, not a stack trace.

SKILL said 'distinct port to debug two projects' but sessions are keyed per workspace-root (port ignored once a session is live); corrected to use a distinct --workspace-root (source: client.js sessionPaths hashes workspace only).
documented the literal confirm:true field + step recipe for storageClear/Set/Remove (no shorthand).
skyline-media session form now shows the options:{fixtureImage} wrapper + restore for camera-mock.
normalizeForScan stripped * but not _, so `_vince-mp_ _factoryreset_` escaped; now strips [*_]; mkFail3 seeds the underscore form (verified caught, no new FP).
documented console returns the first pageSize (default 50, oldest-first) of the 1000 buffer; use --page-size or step listConsole pageIdx.
documented that the output parent dir must pre-exist (no mkdir) for shot/elementScreenshot/screenshot.
documented eval/sysinfo/scan cap at ~200KB and ignore --max-bytes (only data honors it).
documented nav=navigateTo-only; tabBar pages need step switchTab; reLaunch for a full reset.
added a step-only-actions list (setPageData mutates + plain-object, appGlobalData, launchOptions, etc.) + setPageData/storage in the non-invasive side-effect rule.
CHANGELOG self-test count 10/10 -> reworded (suite grew to 14).
metric-plan loaded-context ~94 -> ~110 lines.

the 'vince-mp <backticked-arg>' form (bare binary + backticked ARG, decidable and distinct from the backticked-BINARY accepted-limit) escaped; normalizeForScan now neutralizes a backtick/tilde between the bare binary and its token (negative lookbehind preserves the noun-phrase limit); mkFail4 seeds it (verified caught; noun phrase still passes); self-test now collects mkFail* generically.

network recipe: start is synchronous, success/fail arrive after the round-trip — settle/re-poll networkList before concluding; generalized the tap/input settle rule to any trigger + data/networkList/mediaList reads.
scan recipe: callPageMethod resolves on the handler's sync return, not its async wx.request->setData — settle before reading data.
added field shapes for step-only actions (setPageData/storageSet/elementTrigger/elementAttribute|Property/longpress/mediaAction).
check_release_gate header comment updated (manifest is now passed:true).
SKILL said --no-session works on 'any shorthand' but console rejects it (buffer lives in the session daemon -> INVALID_ARGUMENT); carved console out in SKILL + cli-contract.

accepted_limits.note: the content regex-checks (safety polarity, command-position, fabrication) cannot verify EVERY natural-language phrasing; a novel paraphrase is the SAME documented limit (covered by the multi-seed self-test for known classes + the maker/checker), not a new defect.

check_battery_clean requires kind:check regressions to name a ledger.new_checks id, but new_checks is author-declared; whether a check is genuinely RELATED to a defect is the maker/checker's job (undecidable mechanically).

a custom simple command that ignores args and exits 0 could be listed as extra evidence, but the REQUIRED core (validate-skill + run_all + run_all --self-test) always runs, so it cannot mask a real failure or close the gate on a broken skill.
contract_coverage_complete proves a command/shorthand is documented in a command position, not that the surrounding prose is correct — prose correctness is the maker/checker's job.

escalations.note: STALE_OR_UNKNOWN_UID and STORAGE_CLEAR_REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION appear only in capabilities.js with no runtime emit site.
help --json lists 7 commands; capabilities lists 10 (env, logs missing from help).
APP_NOT_RUNNING is emitted but absent from capabilities.importantErrors.
cli.js help text says 'bindscancode event'; should be a scancode-shaped event.
session start/stop/restart/reconnect/status not in capabilities/help, so a harness check can't ground them (verified correct in source).
src/workflow.js has a NUL byte ~line 114 that makes plain grep treat the file as binary; runtime-harmless but a tooling landmine.
